# Geo Tag Editor - LLMs Configuration File

This file provides information about the Geo Tag Editor project for AI/LLM systems.

## Project Overview
Geo Tag Editor is a web-based application for adding, editing, and removing GPS location data from photos. The application provides online tools for geotagging photos and managing EXIF data.

## Key Features
- Add GPS coordinates to photos online
- Remove geotags from photos
- Edit EXIF data
- Batch photo processing
- Privacy-focused photo editing

## Technology Stack
- Frontend: HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript
- Backend: Static hosting (Vercel/Netlify compatible)
- No server-side processing required
- Client-side photo processing

## Repository Structure
- `/` - Root directory with main pages
- `/css/` - Stylesheets
- `/js/` - JavaScript files
- `/images/` - Static images and assets
- `/blog/` - Blog posts and articles
- `/partials/` - Reusable HTML components

## Important Files
- `index.html` - Main landing page
- `geo-tag-editor.html` - Main tool page
- `add-gps-to-photo-online.html` - GPS addition tool
- `remove-geotag-from-photo-online.html` - GPS removal tool
- `vercel.json` - Deployment configuration

## Development Notes
- This is a static website project
- All photo processing happens client-side
- No external APIs required for core functionality
- SEO optimized with structured data
- Mobile responsive design

## Deployment
- Optimized for Vercel deployment
- Compatible with Netlify and other static hosts
- Uses .htaccess for URL rewriting on Apache servers
